toast.access_ttl_range: Access TTL must be between 60 and 3600 seconds.
toast.auto_logout_inactivity: Automatically signed out due to inactivity.
toast.valid_ics_url: Please enter a valid ICS URL (https://…).
toast.save_channel_before_oauth: Save the channel first, then start OAuth login.
toast.cross_user_drop_todo: Cross-user drop coming soon — V1 only moves slots within the same column.
toast.post_body_empty: The post text must not be empty.
toast.passwords_mismatch: The new passwords do not match.
toast.instance_already_setup: This instance has already been set up.
toast.cannot_move_into_self: A topic cannot be moved into itself.
toast.draft_adopted_social: Draft adopted — social post draft created.
toast.calendar_connected: Calendar connected. Sync will follow shortly.
toast.conversation_no_channel: Conversation has no channel — no reply possible.
toast.marketing_draft_requested: Marketing draft requested — will appear as a recommendation shortly.
toast.min_one_capability: Select at least one capability (inbound or outbound).
toast.status_change_not_allowed: Status change not allowed in the workflow.
toast.search_started_mission: Search started — leads will appear in the mission shortly.
toast.search_started_run: Search started — leads will appear once the run finishes.
toast.title_slug_required: Title and a slug (a–z, 0–9, –) are required.
toast.upgrade_outreach_requested: Upgrade outreach requested — will appear as a recommendation shortly.
toast.distribution_scheduled: Distribution scheduled — suggestions will appear as recommendations shortly.
toast.from_to_status_identical: From and to status must not be identical.
toast.ai_suggestions_adopted: {{count}} AI suggestion(s) adopted — please review & save.
toast.customer_created_hint: Customer "{{name}}" created — you can complete the details anytime under Customers.
toast.ai_analysis_failed: AI analysis could not be started.
toast.could_not_delete_tracker: Could not delete tracker — is a task still referencing it?
toast.ticket_suggestion_failed: Ticket suggestion could not be requested.
ai_agents.heading: AI Agents
ai_agents.distribution_placeholder: Content/announcement for the agent to distribute across the connected channels (incl. forums)…
security.notifications_desc: In-app (the bell) is always on. Additionally via email or chat.
security.notif_delay_hint: File uploads and ticket assignments/updates are collected for this long, then delivered as a single email/chat message.
security.confirm_end_session: Really end this session? The affected device will be logged out on its next action.
security.confirm_end_others: Log out all other sessions? All other devices will be logged out on their next action.
security.active_sessions_desc: Devices and browsers currently signed in to your account. Each session corresponds to a refresh token. Closing it removes the token immediately — access already granted expires within 1 h.
security.no_sessions: No active sessions — which shouldn't really be possible, since you're signed in right now 🤔
security.idle_logout_desc: Useful on devices that may be left unattended (client meeting, shared laptop). Mouse, keyboard or scroll activity resets the timer.
time_entries.heading: Time entries
time_entries.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
time_entries.form_hint: Capture date, duration and optionally project, task and activity.
time_entries.duration_required: Please enter a duration greater than 0.
tt_settings.heading: Time tracking
tt_settings.subtitle: Rules for timers and time entries in this workspace.
tt_settings.auto_stop_hint: A timer running longer is stopped automatically and capped to this limit; the user is notified. Empty = disabled.
tt_settings.rounding_hint: Round entry duration up to the nearest multiple on save. 0 = no rounding.
tt_settings.lock_after_hint: Entries older than this get locked and can no longer be changed. Empty = disabled.
tt_settings.allow_future_hint: Permit entries with a start time in the future.
tt_settings.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
subscription_form.name: Name
subscription_form.system_hint: Leave empty for services that apply to the whole customer (e.g. a retainer).
subscription_form.auto_renew_hint: Affects when "Next billing" is automatically rolled forward.
ws_channels.oauth_hint: No password is needed for {{provider}}. Click below to authorize Worktide with {{provider}} — you'll be redirected to their sign-in page and returned here after confirming.
ws_channels.description: Mailboxes, Slack bots, Zabbix webhooks and everything else that connects Worktide to the outside world. Auth data is stored libsodium-encrypted in the DB.
ws_channels.empty: No channels. Create the first mailbox.
ws_channels.confirm_delete: Really delete channel "{{name}}"? Conversations + events will be cascaded.
ws_channels.dialog_description: Configuration for the connection to the mail server. The password is stored encrypted.
bulk.delete_description: {{count}} selected tasks will be deleted (soft delete). Tasks you don't have delete rights for are skipped.
ws_settings.subtitle: Master data for this tenant — only workspace admins can save here.
ws_settings.slug_hint: URL identifier, e.g. for a sub-domain. Lowercase + hyphens.
ws_settings.access_ttl_hint: Stricter (smaller) than the global 1-hour default — higher values are ignored. With multiple workspaces the shortest TTL per user wins.
portal_settings.title: Customer portal
portal_settings.subtitle: Configuration of the customer portal for this tenant — only workspace admins can save.
portal_settings.welcome_hint: Shown in the customer-portal invitation email above the access link. Leave empty to send only the default text.
portal_settings.welcome_placeholder: e.g. Welcome to our customer portal! Here you'll find your tickets, quotes and documents.
portal_settings.waiting_hint: Tickets in a flagged status pause their SLA and appear in the portal under "Waiting on me". (Completed statuses are excluded.)
portal_settings.sla_desc_1: Target times per ticket priority, in hours from ticket creation:
portal_settings.sla_desc_3: (ticket done). Determines the SLA display in the portal.
portal_settings.sla_desc_5: = no SLA. Customers with their own SLA override this.
tasks.heading: Tasks
tag_suggest.need_content: Fill in a few fields first.
product_form.no_recommendations: No recommendations yet. Generate a draft – the agent proposes one post per channel (approval stays with you).
product_form.release_hint: Automatically marked as "current"; the previous current version is set to "supported".
accept_share.expired: This share is invalid or has expired.
accept_share.no_workspace: Sharing not possible. Please switch to the target workspace and open the link again.
accept_share.not_member: You are not a member of the active workspace.
accept_share.accept_failed: The share could not be accepted.
accept_share.subtitle: Project share
accept_share.success_named: "{{name}}" has been shared with your workspace.
accept_share.success: The project has been shared with your workspace.
accept_share.needs_login: Please sign in to the workspace the project should be shared with, then open this link again.
ws_tags.desc_lead: Workspace-wide tags for labeling projects, tasks and customers. The scope restricts where the tag is offered —
ws_tags.empty_all: No tags yet. Create the first one.
ws_tags.name: Name
ws_tags.confirm_delete: Really delete tag "{{name}}"? The markers on linked projects/tasks will be lost.
ws_tags.dialog_desc: Name, scope and color — from the next render on, the tag is visible in all matching pickers and lists.
ws_tags.picker_hint: also appears in project and task pickers.
prio_scoring.title: Priority score
prio_scoring.desc: Weights of the internally computed ticket score (0–100). Purely a computed value — the manually set priority stays untouched. Weighted relative to one another (total is irrelevant).
board_config.title: Configure board columns
board_config.desc: Group statuses into columns. When a card is dragged into a column it takes that column's "primary" status. Unassigned statuses appear as their own columns.
board_config.empty: No groups — the board shows one column per status. Add a group to combine statuses.
social_list.subtitle_tail: compose once, publish to multiple networks
social_list.empty: No social posts yet. Create your first one.
profile.heading: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your account details and security.
profile.email_change_note: Email change is not yet implemented.
profile.language_hint: Determines the language of translatable content (statuses, types, tags, templates …).
status_updates.empty: No status updates for this project yet.
releases.description: Plan releases / versions and attach tasks via the "Release / Version" field in the task sheet. Closed releases stay visible — but they drop out of the pickers.
releases.empty: No releases yet. Create the first one to bundle tasks.
releases.name: Name
releases.delete_confirm: Really delete release "{{name}}"? Linked tasks are kept but lose the assignment.
releases.dialog_description: Name, planned ship date and status. Tasks are added via the sheet — not here.
releases.sharing_hint_rest: makes the release selectable in every project — useful for organisation-wide release trains.
contact_portal.title: Portal visibility
contact_portal.description: Which enabled portal areas this contact sees. Off = hidden for this contact, even if the workspace has enabled the area.
contact_portal.none_enabled: No portal areas (other than Tickets) are enabled for this workspace.
sprints.description: A project's backlog and sprints — assign tasks by drag & drop.
sprints.pick_project: Please choose a project to see backlog and sprints.
sprints.create_description: Create an iteration with a start and end date.
sprints.burndown_description: Open tasks per day over the sprint period.
sprints.no_dates: This sprint has no start/end date.
cfd.description: Tasks per status and day, stacked. Widening bands signal bottlenecks; a steadily growing total height points to scope creep.
cfd.needs_project: The cumulative flow diagram needs a project context.
cfd.footnote: Historical bands are reconstructed from logged status changes; changes before the event log was introduced appear in the earliest known status.
project_overview.no_budget: No budget set. {{hours}} tracked so far.
doc_wf.change_note_placeholder: Please be specific — the author will see this note.
ws_workflows.title: Workflows
ws_workflows.description: Defines per tracker which status changes are allowed and which roles may perform them. As long as no rule exists for a start status, all changes are open — the first rule switches it to a strict workflow. Workspace owners and admins always bypass the rules.
ws_workflows.empty: No rules. Every status change is allowed.
ws_workflows.dialog_description: Defines an allowed status change. Leave the role list empty and choose „Any role" if the rule should only structurally permit the change without restricting it.
sources.title: Channels
sources.intro: Worktide exchanges messages over every connected channel — emails, webhooks, chat, social — receiving them centrally in the inbox stream and sending replies and posts back out.
sources.empty: No channels yet. Choose a template on the left.
sources.confirm_delete: Delete channel „{{name}}"? Conversations + events will be deleted too.
setup.db_unreachable: The database is not reachable. Please check the configuration.
nl.confirm_send: Send „{{subject}}" to all subscribers of „{{node}}" now?
nl.subject: Subject
import.res_contacts_help: Contacts — customer name or UUID required
import.res_tasks_help: Tasks — title required, project key optional
import.title: CSV import
import.file_hint: First row = column names. Max 5,000 rows.
source_wizard.name: Name
source_wizard.name_hint: Shown as the channel name in lists.
source_wizard.webhook_intro: Give this URL to your sender (Zabbix, Slack, your own script) as the webhook target. The token in the URL authenticates — treat it like a password.
source_wizard.oauth_intro: Clicking starts the {{provider}} sign-in — no app password needed. You'll be brought back here automatically after approving.
source_wizard.test_intro: The connection test checks auth + reachability without pulling or sending any data.
source_wizard.done_hint: New events appear in the inbox stream the next time the sync worker runs (typically within 60 s).
source_wizard.webhook_paste_hint: Click Copy, then enter it as the webhook URL in the respective admin backend.
source_wizard.redmine_project_placeholde: Redmine project ID or key (optional, empty = all)
source_wizard.assigned_placeholder: Assigned to: me or user ID (optional)
source_wizard.redmine_filter_hint: Import only tickets of one tracker and/or a specific assignment. “me” = the API key's user. You'll find the tracker ID in Redmine under Administration → Trackers (in the URL).
source_wizard.read_only_hint: Tickets are only imported. Changes in Worktide are NOT written back to Redmine. Can be switched to bidirectional later.
source_wizard.api_key_placeholder: API key from your Redmine profile
source_wizard.redmine_api_key_hint: Profile → “Show API access key”. Sent as the X-Redmine-API-Key header, not in the URL (safe in access logs).
source_wizard.redmine_webhook_hint: Optional: install the redmine_webhook plugin and enter the following URL under Administration → Settings → Webhooks so Worktide is notified of changes live (instead of a 60s poll).
source_wizard.jira_pat_hint: For Jira Server/DC: Profile → Personal access tokens → create a token with scope "Read + Write Issues". Sent as the Authorization: Bearer header.
source_wizard.jira_webhook_hint: Enter the following URL in Jira → Administration → System → WebHooks and enable the Issue Created / Updated / Deleted events so Worktide is notified of changes live (instead of a 60s poll).
social_composer.subtitle: Write once, publish to multiple networks.
social_composer.body_placeholder: What would you like to share?
social_composer.shared_text_hint: Shared text — customizable per network below.
social_composer.media_upload_soon: Media upload (images/video) is coming — for now the post is published as text.
social_composer.schedule_hint: Empty = not scheduled; publishing happens manually after approval.
social_composer.egress_note_prefix: External sending is protected server-side by the egress approval (
social_composer.egress_note_suffix: ) — without approval nothing leaves the system.
project_form.name: Name
project_form.key_label: Key (slug for task IDs, e.g. WORK)
project_form.private_hint: Only project members can see the project.
project_form.retainer_hint: Recurring service hours, no end date.
project_form.connect_project_hint: Visible to external members and the customer portal.
project_form.delete_desc: The project is soft-deleted and no longer visible in the normal project list. Tasks, time entries and documents stay linked to the project and can be restored if needed.
project_form.new_customer_desc: Quick create — the name is enough. You can fill in the rest of the master data (email, address, VAT ID …) later under Customers.
toast.project_delete_forbidden: Not permitted — only workspace admins can delete projects.
perm.heading: Permissions
perm.intro: Which role may do what in this workspace. Green = allowed, red = denied. Click a cell to flip the default — deviating values are marked with a small dot and can be reset to the default at any time.
perm.owner_note: Owner is always fully authorized and not editable.
perm.hint.toggle_billed_own: May set the “billed” status on their own entries. Disable for accounting separation.
task_detail.title: Title
task_detail.no_releases: No releases in the project yet — create one in the project tab and they'll appear here.
task_detail.dependencies_project_only: Dependencies are only possible within a project. This task is private — add it to a project first.
absences.heading: Absences
absences.intro: Days when nobody is bookable. Company closures apply to everyone, personal absences only to the respective person — both hide booking slots.
absences.label: Name
absences.member_hint_prefix: Hides booking slots when the person hosts a meeting type. Members flagged
absences.customer_intro: Absences entered by customers in the portal — informational only.
customer_sla.title: Customer SLA
customer_sla.desc_before: Custom SLA times (hrs) for this customer — overrides the workspace default.
lead_activity.title: History — {{name}}
cycle_time.description: Time from work start (first status change) to completion, per finished task. Percentiles show the spread — plan with p85, not the average.
cycle_time.empty: No closed tasks in this period.
cvr.description: Per day or week: how many tasks came in, how many were closed?
project_detail.no_id: No project ID in the URL.
team_planner.title: Planner
team_planner.subtitle: Team calendar — one column per employee, drag & drop changes the time slot.
not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.description: This page doesn't exist or has moved. Check the address or head back to the dashboard.
forgot_password.title: Reset password
forgot_password.not_implemented: This view is not implemented yet (placeholder).
forgot_password.hint: Backend endpoint available — UI to follow. In the meantime:
newsletter_templates.title: Newsletter templates
newsletter_templates.empty: No templates yet. Save one via “As template” while composing a newsletter.
customer_systems_list.heading: Systems
contacts_list.heading: Contacts
contact_portal.not_invited_yet: Access enabled — no invitation has been sent yet.
contact_portal.customer_not_enabled: The customer portal is not enabled for this customer — an invitation is only possible once the portal is activated on the customer.
contact_portal.preview_hint: Opens the portal in this customer's view (preview, no password).
contact_portal.email_required: Enabling access requires an email address on the contact.
contact_portal.footer_hint: After enabling access, send the invitation — the contact receives a link to set a password and then signs in to the customer portal (strictly reduced view — no workspace access).
channel_visibility.member_hint: Personal mailbox — visible only to you (and workspace admins). Only admins can create shared team channels.
channel_visibility.shared_desc: All internal members can see and use this channel.
channel_visibility.personal_desc: Only the assigned owner (and admins) can see this channel.
team_members.heading: Members
team_members.subtitle: All members of this workspace, including roles and workload.
throughput.description: Completed tasks per week (by completion date) with a 4-week rolling average. The rate shows delivery speed — not how much is still open.
throughput.empty: No completed tasks in the period.
burndown.description: Number of open tasks per day — shows how the backlog shrinks (or grows) over the selected period.
burndown.open_tasks_title: Open tasks ({{count}} recorded in the period)
projects_list.heading: Projects
calendar.heading: Calendar
calendar.label_all: All tasks with a due date
tag_picker.type_to_create: Type to create a new tag.
project_share.title: Share project
project_share.description: Invite an external workspace by email to collaborate on “{{projectName}}”. The invitation is accepted by someone in the other workspace.
floating_timer.discard_title: Discard (do not create a time entry)
floating_timer.optional_hint: All optional — you can start without a project too.
time_widget.title: Time tracking
time_widget.hint: For project/task selection: floating button at bottom right
login.subtitle: Please sign in to continue.
login.remember: Stay signed in on this device
login.remember_hint: Off = the session ends when the browser window is closed. Recommended for shared computers.
dashboard.reset_confirm: Reset dashboard to the default layout?
newsletters.subtitle: Topic tree that customers subscribe to in the portal. Can be enabled per customer (the customer's "Newsletter" tab).
newsletters.subscribable_hint: Off = a category/structure node with no opt-in of its own.
newsletters.archived_hint: Kept with its history but hidden from the portal.
newsletters.mandatory_hint: Every contact of a granted customer receives it, with no consent or opt-out. For service announcements, not marketing.
newsletters.settings_desc: Apply to every newsletter in this workspace.
newsletters.double_opt_in_hint: After subscribing in the portal, the contact must click a confirmation link emailed to them before anything is sent.
newsletters.sender_name_hint: Display name in recipients' inboxes. The sending address itself stays unchanged.
newsletters.reply_to_hint: Recipient replies go to this address. Empty = default.
forms.heading: Forms
forms.subtitle: Questionnaires — managed globally, distributed to customers or kept internal (reachable via public link).
forms.target_project_hint: Submissions create a task in this project. With no project, only the submission is stored.
forms.recipients_hint: These customers see the form in their portal.
forms.staff_only_note: No recipients — internal / reachable via public link only.
forms.calc_hint: One operator across all operands (e.g. qty × price). Nested expressions are preserved but not editable here.
forms.map.title: → Task title
calendar_sync.heading: Calendar sync
calendar_sync.subtitle: Connect your calendar via an ICS feed — booking slots are then offered only when you're actually free. The feed is synced about every 10 minutes.
calendar_sync.url_hint: The secret iCal/ICS export URL from Google Calendar, Outlook or Apple Calendar. Not shown again for security reasons.
meeting_types.heading: Meeting types
meeting_types.subtitle: Bookable appointments (Calendly-style). Customers book at
meeting_types.title: Title
meeting_types.no_slots: No time slots — no appointments will be offered.
conversation.mail_skipped: Mail skipped — size exceeds the channel limit.
conversation.subject: Subject
customer_agreements.heading: Agreements
customer_agreements.manage_types_desc: Workspace-wide — changes to name/description apply to every customer.
customer_agreements.line_items_desc: Line items of the current contract version. Descriptions are translatable.
customer_agreements.empty: No agreement types configured. Create some under "Agreement types" (or seed SLA/AV/NDA in the backend).
customer_agreements.dialog_desc: Record the agreement status. Each change creates a new version; the history is preserved.
customer_agreements.file_selected: Will be stored in the customer's document store: {{name}}
customer_agreements.file_hint: Optional — will be stored in the customer's document store and attached to this version.
bookings_page.heading: Bookings
bookings_page.subtitle: Appointments booked via the meeting types.
industries.heading: Industries
industries.subtitle: Managed industry list — customers pick from it (with type-ahead suggestions).
documents.confirm_delete: Really delete this page? Including all subpages.
documents.empty_spaces: No space yet. Click + to create the first one.
documents.empty_editor: Pick a page on the left or create a new one.
customer_products.heading: Products & services
customer_products.empty_catalog_before: No catalogue yet. First add something under
customer_products.empty_assignments: Nothing is assigned to this customer yet.
customer_products.dialog_description: Products are pinned to a version — an upgrade simply switches to the newer version.
customer_form.notes_placeholder: Free-form. Account manager changes, delivery addresses, quirks …
my_tasks.heading: My tasks
my_tasks.empty: Nothing here — grab yourself a coffee.
customer_portal_card.title: Customer portal
customer_portal_card.enable_label: Enable the portal for this customer
customer_portal_card.enable_hint: Only while this is active can enabled contacts of this customer sign in to the customer portal. Disabling blocks login immediately — including active sessions.
subscription_edit.missing_id: No subscription ID in the URL.
social_post_edit.missing_id: No post ID in the URL.
workspace_trackers.title: Trackers (Bug / Feature / Story / Support …)
workspace_trackers.description: Classification for tasks — shown as a colored icon in the Kanban, in lists and in the sheet. One tracker per workspace is the default for new tasks.
workspace_trackers.empty: No trackers yet. Create the first one.
workspace_trackers.confirm_delete: Really delete tracker "{{name}}"? Tasks currently using it must be reassigned first.
tracker_dialog.description: Name, icon and color — trackers appear as a colored mini chip on every task.
tracker_dialog.set_default: Use as default for new tasks
quick_add.title: Quick add
quick_add.key_hint: Suggested from the name; unique per workspace.
network_sim.server_desc: For 30 s all requests respond with 503.
network_sim.slow_desc: 8 s latency per request, good for spinner checks.
network_sim.title: Network simulator
network_sim.hint_idle: Click a mode → applies immediately to all requests.
member_edit.no_assignments: No tasks are assigned to this member.
member_edit.edit_desc: Manage this member's name, email, role and access.
member_edit.email_hint: Email is the login — must be unique.
member_edit.active_no: Blocked — no access to this workspace.
member_edit.self_lock: You cannot block or remove your own membership.
search.placeholder: Search mail, tasks, customers, contacts, projects, documents…
activity.heading: Activity
accept_invitation.error_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
accept_invitation.error_invalid_or_expir: This invitation is invalid or has expired.
accept_invitation.error_generic: The invitation could not be accepted.
accept_invitation.description: You have been invited to a workspace.
accept_invitation.hint: If you don't have an account yet, set a password below. Existing accounts can leave the fields empty.
subscriptions_list.heading: Subscriptions
mrr.other_currencies: Other currencies in the last month:
reports.heading: Reports
reports.subtitle: Time tracking, burndown, created-vs-resolved, cycle time and MRR.
reports.empty_time_entries: No time entries in this period.
inbox.subtitle: All incoming conversations from mail, Slack and other channels.
inbox.empty: No conversations — as soon as a channel brings events, they will appear here.
customer_system_form.active_hint: Inactive systems remain in the history but do not trigger maintenance alerts.
customer_system_form.credentials_warning: ⚠ Plaintext. Only store real passwords here once encryption (KMS story, coming later) is in place.
customers_list.heading: Customers
customer_detail.no_id: No customer ID in the URL.
customer_projects.title: Projects ({{n}})
customer_projects.empty: This customer has no projects yet.
customer_files.confirm_delete_folder: Folder "{{name}}" and all its contents will be deleted.
contact_form.active_hint: Inactive contacts remain in the history but no longer appear in suggestions.
access_tokens.intro_before: Long-lived bearer tokens for external integrations — CI scripts, the Worktide MCP server, your own dashboards. Every token runs under your user and respects your permissions. Authentication uses the
access_tokens.active_desc: Non-revoked tokens. Revoked tokens are shown greyed out at the end of the list.
access_tokens.revoke_confirm: Really revoke token "{{name}}"? External integrations using this token will break immediately.
access_tokens.create_desc: Give the token a descriptive name — typically the name of the integration that uses it ("MCP local", "GitHub Actions" etc.). Optionally you can set an expiry date.
access_tokens.issued_warning: Copy the token now — it won't be shown again.
access_tokens.issued_hint: Keep it like a password; lost = create a new one.
contact_portal_access.title: Customer portal access
product_edit.missing_id: No product ID in the URL.
product_list.title: Products & Services
product_list.subtitle: Your catalogue — products (versioned) and services, assignable to customers.
lead_list.title: Leads
mission_create.prompt_placeholder: e.g. Find 1000 key accounts in the DACH region that would be suitable partners.
mission_create.brief_clear: The brief is clear. Start the search now?
mission_create.answer_placeholder: Enter an answer (or tap the options above)…
mission_list.title: Research / Acquisition
mission_list.empty: No missions yet. Start a new research.
invite_members.title: Invite people
saved_views.dialog_description: The filter set is saved under this name and can be applied again at any time.
saved_views.share_hint: Other members will then also see the filter.
contact_absences.title: Absences
contact_edit.missing_id: No contact ID in the URL.
customer_system_edit.missing_id: No system ID in the URL.
ai_toast.draft_social: Draft adopted – social post draft created.
ai_toast.draft_email: Adopted – email draft created (sent only after approval).
ai_toast.draft_generic: Adopted – draft created (sent/published only after approval).
perm.sla: No permission — only admins can change the SLA policy.
perm.workspace: No permission — only admins can change workspace settings.
perm.security: No permission — only admins can change security settings.
perm.pattern: No permission — only admins can change this pattern.
toast.could_not_change_billing_status: Could not change the billing status.
reports.throughput_q: How much do we complete per week?
social_composer.tagline: write once → publish to multiple networks
perm.billing_locked: No permission — billing status is locked in this workspace.
widget.active_timer.label: Time tracking
widget.my_projects.label: My projects
widget.open_customer_tasks.label: Open customer tasks
widget.open_customer_tasks.desc: Cross-project open tasks of customer projects
widget.my_tasks.label: My tasks
widget.my_tasks.desc: Tasks assigned to me, filtered by due date
widget.recent_status_updates.label: Status updates
valid.email: Please enter a valid email address
notifications.title: Notifications
services_list.heading: Services
services_list.subtitle: Your versioned service catalogue — each offering with priced versions, assignable to customers.
service_form.name: Name
service_form.label: Label
service_form.release_hint: The new version is automatically marked as "current".
customer_services.heading: Services & subscriptions
customer_services.empty: No service is assigned to this customer yet.
customer_services.dialog_description: A service is pinned to a specific version (with price & cycle); the price can be overridden per customer.
customer_services.price_override_hint: If the price stays unchanged, no override is stored. Effective:
